Docs.summary: Represents a 32-bit color used only by the documentation eval harness.

remarks.format:
## Remarks
The color stores its four components packed in ARGB order. Each component is an 8-bit value in the range 0 to 255.
```csharp var color = new SampleColor(0xFF, 0x80, 0x40, 0x20); var alpha = color.Alpha; ```

Docs.summary: Gets the alpha component of the color.
Docs.value: The alpha component, in the range 0 to 255. The default value is 255.
Docs.remarks: An alpha of 0 is fully transparent and 255 is fully opaque.

Docs.summary: Returns a new color with the specified alpha component.
Docs.returns: A new with the supplied alpha.
Docs.remarks: The original color is not modified because the value is a structure.
